nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the sqlparser crate, RisingWave's SQL parser forked from Apache Arrow DataFusion, producing both a library and a fuzz-testing binary.

nodes.name: LICENSE.TXT
nodes.summary: Apache License 2.0 license text for the sqlparser crate, reflecting its origin as a fork of the open-source SQL parser library.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief README for the RisingWave SQL parser crate with a note on how to add new YAML-based parser test cases.

nodes.name: sqlparser_test.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task definition for the update-parser-test task that regenerates expected parser test output files.
